null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Summary

The `server_hostname` TLS SNI check can be bypassed when an existing connection is reused.

### Impact

If an application makes multiple requests to the same domain, but with different per-request `server_hostname` parameters, then the later calls may succeed by reusing the existing connection when they should have been rejected due to the TLS SNI check.

### Workaround

Disable keep_alive if you need to change the `server_hostname` check between requests.

-----

Patch: https://github.com/aio-libs/aiohttp/commit/0ca2b6c28a25726527a8b60f25960262a91ed0e0", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4m7w-qmgq-4wj5", "html_url": "https://github.com/aio-libs/aiohttp/security/advisories/GHSA-4m7w-qmgq-4wj5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4m7w-qmgq-4wj5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54275"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-08T20:11:35Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2203121?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Dreamsorcerer", "id": 2203121, "login": "Dreamsorcerer", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjIyMDMxMjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Dreamsorcerer", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "low", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "TLS Server Hostname Override Is Ignored When Reusing HTTPS Connections", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T18:39:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/aio-libs/aiohttp/security-advisories/GHSA-4m7w-qmgq-4wj5", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "aiohttp"}, "patched_versions": "3.14.1", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<=3.14.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
